evals.prompt: I'm done with my llm-d benchmark run. Please tear down the stack in my rachelt-benchmark namespace.
evals.expected_output: Detects namespace rachelt-benchmark, lists helm releases, presents teardown plan, confirms with user before uninstalling releases. Does not delete HTTPRoutes without asking.

evals.prompt: Remove only the model service from my llm-d stack in namespace llm-d-test, but keep the gateway.
evals.expected_output: Lists all helm releases, identifies the model service release(s), presents a partial teardown plan scoped to only those releases, confirms before uninstalling. Does not touch gateway or HTTPRoutes.

evals.prompt: Clean up everything in namespace llm-d-dev after my experiment — releases and httproutes.
evals.expected_output: Lists all resources, presents full teardown plan. Confirms helm releases, then separately asks about HTTPRoutes deletion — as a distinct opt-in step. Executes each only after user confirms.
